name_en: YSL Saint Laurent counter 'Néon' bag, latest version from Saint Laurent & SLP counters. Market exclusive, imported leather factory leather, goat skin texture, hand-embroidered V-line, super soft and comfortable, exquisite shape 👏👏👏 practical, model 428056, YSL black buckle at opening, flawless hardware, exquisite handcraft details, comes with exquisite original pendant 🍂🍂🍂🍂 size 24*20*8.5cm! F26611
